title: callista pusilla
intro: Callista pusilla, also known as the "Dwarf Callista" or "Pink Callista", is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb native to tropical Africa, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Callista pusilla is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be administered orally or topically to take advantage of its reported health benefits.
